nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Satya, Ashish, Sashi.

English, Welsh, Scottish, and Jewish: from the Biblical Hebrew personal name meaning ‘given by God’. This was borne by a minor prophet in the Bible (2 Samuel 7:2). The name Nathaniel is also found among Christians in southern India, but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: O
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: W O Nathaniel was born about 1660, in England, United Kingdom. She married Nathaniel Jackson about 1676, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: W O Nathaniel(은)는 대략 1660년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1676년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Nathaniel Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.
